name: networking-agent
description: Referral-first job networking on your own Claude tokens: guided onboarding for any field (/network-setup), a Finder that discovers + ranks the right people at a target company or for a specific job posting, a Drafter that writes outreach in YOUR voice under strict anti-fabrication guardrails, a critic quality gate, follow-up scheduling, and a coaching layer that explains the strategy as it works.
